data.raw:
diff --git a/resources/views/contact.blade.php b/resources/views/contact.blade.php --- a/resources/views/contact.blade.php +++ b/resources/views/contact.blade.php @@ -1,6 +1,7 @@ -

Contact

+

Contact us

@csrf +

ui_apply.summary: Contact form refined with locked microcopy and a11y label

states.empty: Initial render: name field empty, submit enabled
states.loading: Submit pressed: button shows spinner, field disabled
states.error: Validation error: field-level message under input
states.disabled: Field disabled while loading state is active

microcopy.title: Contact us
microcopy.success: Thanks — we will be in touch within one business day.

a11y.labels: name field has visible label tied via for/id
a11y.focus: first invalid field receives focus on submit error
a11y.aria_live: success card is announced via aria-live=polite

changes.summary: Contact form refined with locked microcopy and a11y label

questions: > Stack: `plain`. Reviewing rendered components against the locked design brief.
> The review pass compares `state.ticket.ui_apply.rendered` against `state.ui_design` (microcopy, states, a11y, layout) and produces a structured `findings` list.
> 1. Continue — run the review and write `{findings: [...], review_clean: bool}` into `state.ui_review`
